channel.title: Posts on Ding YuChen
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Ding YuChen

item.title: Math and Computer Science
item.description: Being a double-degree student, I often think about why I am good in 1 half of my degree and so much worse in the other. Even though I seriously suck at math, I find that the subject has been made much more accessible after delving into computer science. Here’s why. Bridge from the concrete to the abstract In the Singapore context, we were most certainly asked to draw models to solve math word problems.
